sections.paragraph:
f. of the noun סֹךְ-

(1) a booth, a cot, made of leaves and branches interwoven, Jon 4:5 Job 27:18 Isa 4:6. חַג הַסֻּכֹּות the feast of tabernacles, the feast of booths of branches, Lev 23:34 Deu 16:13.-It is once used contemptuously of a small ruined house, Amo 9:11 [it is difficult to see what idea of contempt is contained in the passage]; elsewhere used of tents made of curtains, Lev 23:43 2Sa 11:11 22:12 and poet. of the habitation of God, Psa 18:12 Job 36:29.

(2) a booth for cattle, Gen 33:17.

(3) the lair of a lion, Job 38:40.
